title: lantana aculeata f. parvifolia
intro: Lantana aculeata f. parvifolia, also known as small-leaved buttonbush, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, native to the Americas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of essential oils. The health benefits of Lantana aculeata f. parvifolia include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Lantana aculeata f. parvifolia is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a valuable asset in natural medicine.
